import json
ans=[]
ind = (_input.first().json.rowIndex)
ind=int(ind)

for i in _input.first().json.myData:
  if ind==0:
    ans.append(i)
    ans.append(_input.first().json.myData[i])
    break
  ind=ind-1

# Return in valid n8n format
return [{"json": {"result": ans}}]
